regional_cost_note: Carpet layers in Invercargill typically charge $20–$35/m² installed, one of the most affordable rates in New Zealand. Southland's cooler climate drives strong demand for warm wool carpets.

businesses.name: Camerons Flooring
businesses.known_for: Local Invercargill specialist supplying and installing carpet, vinyl, vinyl planks, timber and laminate flooring for residential and commercial clients in Southland.

businesses.name: Thermalay
businesses.known_for: Wholesale flooring supplier and installer with 15+ years experience; uses professional power-stretching equipment for residential and commercial carpet laying across Otago and Southland.

businesses.name: GroutPro Dunedin and area
businesses.known_for: Flooring and renovation specialist serving Invercargill, Southland, and Otago; offers carpet, timber, and vinyl flooring alongside grout repair and tiling services.
